items.name: color-area
items.title: Color Area
items.description: A 2D color picker area. Headless, accessible, and fully composable.

items.name: use-color
items.title: useColor
items.description: Core dual-state hook for requested vs displayed color management with deterministic sRGB/P3 mapping.

items.name: color
items.title: Color
items.description: React context provider for sharing dual-state color contracts between color-kit components.

items.name: color-slider
items.title: Color Slider
items.description: A 1D color slider for requested channel edits with interaction metadata and keyboard support.

items.name: color-input
items.title: Color Input
items.description: A channel-based value input with expression parsing and left-edge scrubbing.

items.name: color-string-input
items.title: Color String Input
items.description: Legacy free-form text input for full color strings (hex, rgb, hsl, oklch).
